scope: hardening of the F0a audit-cache local-build content digest
changes: expanded the exposed workdir fingerprint from a 24-hex truncation to the full 64-hex SHA-256
salted the no-workdir identity as well as project identities
made unreadable manifest, toolchain, or .olean content generate a fresh cache-bypass nonce instead of a reusable unreadable identity
